title: Her Face.
content:
The gladness of our Southern spring; the grace
    Of summer; and the dreaminess of fall
    Are parts of her sweet nature. Such a face
    Was Ruth's, methinks, divinely spiritual.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Her Face."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
